intro.title: Welcome
intro.text: Ebrulu Konak is proud to offer the most luxurious and comfortable hotel service in the Yunak region. With its historic architecture, elegant design, and rare service standards, we aim to provide our guests with an unforgettable experience.

about.title: Ebrulu Konak
about.subtitle: Relive History in Safranbolu
about.intro:
History is not just a story being told; it is a journey that is felt, lived, and rediscovered.

At Ebrulu Konak, the elegant Ottoman architecture and the unique cultural heritage of Safranbolu come back to life. In every room a memory, in every mansion the traces of centuries are hidden.

We invite you to walk through the history of Safranbolu, experience the warmth of traditional hospitality, and create unforgettable memories.

**Ebrulu Konak**
**Relive History in Safranbolu**
about.description:
Ebrulu Konak, established in 2004, consists of 5 historic mansions preserving the historical texture of Safranbolu and houses 38 rooms, offering guests an unforgettable experience with the traces of the past in every corner.

With its historic architecture, elegant design, and rare service standards, we aim to provide our guests with an unforgettable experience.

In our restaurant services, we combine traditional Safranbolu flavors with modern presentation, offering a menu that appeals to our guests' tastes.

Commitment to quality and guest satisfaction is the cornerstone of our service philosophy. We strive for excellence in every detail and aim to exceed our guests' expectations.

As Ebrulu Konak, our mission is to preserve Safranbolu's historical and cultural richness and pass this heritage to future generations.

contact.pageDesc: Please contact us with your questions, suggestions, or to learn more about making a reservation.

corporate.pageDesc: Learn about Ebrulu Konak and discover our mission, vision, and values.
corporate.about:
Ebrulu Konak, reflecting Ottoman architecture and the historical texture of Safranbolu, offers a unique experience to its guests. The perfect combination of luxury and tradition allows every guest to embark on a historical journey.

In our restaurants, the most special dishes of Safranbolu cuisine are served in a modern manner. The combination of traditional flavors with contemporary presentation style enchants our guests.

The service provided at Ebrulu Konak is not just accommodation, but also a lifestyle. Every detail is designed with our guests' comfort and satisfaction at the forefront.

Our professional and trained staff is ready to respond to every wish of our guests. When you visit Safranbolu and stay at Ebrulu Konak, you will experience a perfect blend of history and luxury.

While the traces of history are seen in every corner of Safranbolu, the moment you enter the doors of Ebrulu Konak, you too become part of this history.
corporate.missionText: To provide guests visiting Safranbolu with unforgettable memories in the depth of history, in the comfort of luxury, and in the warmth of hospitality.
corporate.visionText: To be Safranbolu's most prestigious and preferred hotel, preserving Ottoman architecture, combining traditional and modern values, and providing services at international standards.
corporate.value1Desc: Ensuring the highest quality in every detail of the services we provide to our guests
corporate.value2Desc: Sincere and genuine treatment towards our guests, the core value of Ebrulu Konak
corporate.value3Desc: Achieving excellence together with our professional team
corporate.value4Desc: Adopting the most current and innovative approaches in the hospitality industry
